name: Kentucky Colonel Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the butter and mix with 1 pound of powdered sugar.
2. Add whiskey, then add a second pound of powdered sugar; chopped nuts; and lemon juice (if desired).
3. Blend until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Roll into balls and let cool overnight.
5. Melt chocolate and paraffin in the top of a double boiler.
6. Blend well and allow to cool slightly.
7. Dip the candy into the melted chocolate mixture. For best results, use dark chocolate.
